title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 31 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 31 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 31 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 31/03/2025
Today, iron ore futures continued to decline weakly. The most-traded contract I2505 closed at 773, down 1.47% for the day.Traders'willingness to sell was poor, steel mills remained cautious and mainly observed, and purchase willingness was moderate. The market transaction atmosphere was relatively flat.
